notableEvents.label: Nick Gonzales GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales grounds into a double play, shortstop Jorge Mateo to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Jared Triolo scores. Henry Davis to 3rd. Spencer Horwitz out at 2nd. Nick Gonzales out at 1st.
